setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added comprehensive tests for UnitTest1 class, covering constructor and method invocation scenarios
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding more meaningful logic to Test1() method to enable more substantive testing
fileReports.note: Current implementation is minimal and lacks specific business logic

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling in writeMessage method
Implement logging mechanism instead of Console.WriteLine for better testability
Add configuration options for flush timeout in Dispose method
fileReports.note: Tests use localhost:9092 as a placeholder. In real-world scenarios, you'll need to mock Kafka producer or use integration testing approaches.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading, exception handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more detailed logging in exception scenarios
Implement more granular error handling in readMessage method
Add configuration options for timeout and retry mechanisms
fileReports.note: Tests use mocking to simulate Kafka consumer behavior without actual Kafka infrastructure

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering property initialization, status assignment, and enum validation with 8 test cases
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for productname and quantity
Implement custom validation logic for order quantities
Add more complex business rules for order status transitions
keyImprovements: Tested default and custom initialization scenarios
fileReports.note: Tests cover basic model behavior and do not require complex mocking or external dependencies

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController with 6 test cases covering various scenarios including valid order processing, model validation, serialization, constructor initialization, and error handling.
recommendations: Add input validation for OrderRequest properties
Consider adding logging for better traceability
Implement more robust error handling in ProducerWrapper
fileReports.note: Tests assume existence of OrderRequest model with CustomerId, ProductId, and Quantity properties. Adjust test data if model differs.
